title: Guaranteed Profit
description: A mod that adds gambling related things, like a slot machine and Crazy Slots from HxH.
body:
**Guaranteed Profit** is a mod about **Gambling**. 

**Features:**

- **Slot machine**, The slot machine accepts diamonds from right clicking on it with a diamond in hand and you can use redstone to activate and "spin" the slot machine. Right now you can win 1-6 diamonds and/or the Slot Spinner Item each spin.
- The slot spinner item can be used in crafting or you can right click on a slot machine with it to get a free spin.
- **Crazy Slots** (from hxh) Crazy Slots is an item that when right clicked transforms into **1 of 6 possible weapons**. 
  The possible weapons Crazy Slots can turn into are a **Scythe**, **Mace**, **Crossbow**, **Trident** (that can only be used as a riptide trident), **Axe**, **Sword** (The sword saves you from death like a totem of undying). 
  After hitting an enemy with or using your new weapon you can right click the weapon to turn it back into Crazy Slots!

99.9% of gamblers quit right before they win big!!!!!

**Plans for the future:**
- Add roulette
- ~~Add crazy slots from hxh~~

If you want to contact me for whatever reason my discord username is blindnutt
